model: v20clean 3-seed club ensemble + v21goal blend w=0.65 (lineup-aware)
confirmed_lineup_note: Both XIs 11/11 from ESPN summary (event 401896234) minutes before kickoff; prediction run on confirmed lineups. 20/22 player embeddings matched, well-covered both sides: Dynamo Kyiv (home) 11/11, PAOK (away) 9/11.

bets.staking_method: Half-Kelly/8%-cap formula: fullKelly 35.0%, halfKelly 17.5% -> cap binds -> 0.08 x EUR193.43 = EUR15.47 -> EUR16.00. Taken at close to full formula size (unlike Qarabag/Paide) because both sides carry strong lineup-embedding coverage (11/11 home, 9/11 away) -- the large edge is judged data-supported rather than a thin-data blind spot.

excluded_legs_note: Draw (-8.8pp edge, -28.0% EV) and Away win (-21.4pp edge, -53.1% EV) both clearly excluded as no-bets.
data_note: 20/22 player embeddings matched (home 11/11, away 9/11) -- among the best-covered matches of the day; edge treated as more trustworthy than the Qarabag/Paide thin-data pattern for that reason.
provenance_note: Prediction generated pre-kickoff from confirmed XIs (session artifacts); bet placed at Unibet around the 17:00Z kickoff; this commit logged minutes after kickoff, before any result information. Not a pre-kickoff-proof pick per the strict standard.
settlement_note: Home win (Dynamo Kyiv) leg lost -- PAOK won 3-2 away. Settled via ESPN scoreboard (event 401896234, STATUS_FULL_TIME).
